channel.title: Warrior on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.description: Recent content in Warrior on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2024 Zuluhotel Omega. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Anatomy
item.description:
Using anatomy on a player or npc will determine their physical strength, agility and stamina.

If your anatomy skill is higher than 75 it will show the percentage of stamina the target has left with the message:

“This being is at xxx% of his max vigor.”

Anatomy will also increase your damage with melee weapons and the amount healed with bandages.

Strength

Strength Message
0-15 like they would have trouble lifting small objects.
16 - 30 Rather Feeble.
31 - 45 Somewhat weak.
46 - 60 To be of normal strength.
61 - 75 Somewhat strong.
76 - 90 Very strong.
91 - 105 Extremely strong.
106 - 120 Extraordinarily strong.
121 - 135 Strong as an ox.
136 - 150 One of the strongest people you have ever seen.
151 or higher Superhumanly strong.

Dexterity

Dexterity Message
0 - 15 like they barely manage to stay standing.
16 - 30 Very clumsy.
31 - 45 Somewhat uncoordinated.
46 - 60 Moderately dextrous.
61 - 75 Somewhat agile.
76 - 90 Very agile.
91 - 105 Extremely agile.
106 - 120 Extraordinarily agile.
121 - 135 Moves like quicksilver.
136 - 150 One of the fastest people you have ever seen.
151 or higher Superhumanly agile.

item.title: Fencing
item.description:
Fencing will increase the damage and hit chance of fencing weapons.

Weapon Damage (x dices with x sides + fixed damage) Speed (Higher is faster) Hit type Blocks casting if equipped
Dagger 3d3 50 Normal Yes
Kryss 2d4+3 65 Normal Yes
Kryss of the Poison Element 2d4+18 98 Poisonhit lvl 3 No
Lance of Lothian 2d10+36 54 Banish hit No
Mystical Dagger 3d3 50 Normal No
Mystical Kryss 2d4+3 65 Normal No
Mystical Pitchfork 5d4 30 Normal No
Mystical Short Spear 3d6+3 40 Normal No
Mystical Skinning Knife 1d8 50 Normal No
Mystical Spear 1d20+1 35 Normal No
Mystical War Fork 4d6 35 Normal No
Pitchfork 5d4 30 Normal Yes
Pitchfork of the Shadow Element 5d4+25 45 Normal No
Scalpel of Trevize 1d8+21 75 Piercing hit No
Short Spear 3d6+3 40 Normal Yes
Skinning Knife 1d8 50 Normal Yes
Spear 1d20+1 35 Normal Yes
Spear of Renah 3d6+38 60 Spell hit: Spell: Meteor Swarm Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 7 No
Stygian Dagger 3d3 75 Normal No
Stygian Kryss 2d4+3 98 Normal No
Stygian Pitchfork 5d4 45 Normal No
Stygian Short Spear 3d6+3 60 Normal No
Stygian Skinning Knife 1d8 75 Normal No
Stygian Spear 1d20+1 54 Normal No
Stygian War Fork 4d6 53 Normal No
Swift Dagger 3d3 75 Normal Yes
Swift Kryss 2d4+3 98 Normal Yes
Swift Pitchfork 5d4 45 Normal Yes
Swift Short Spear 3d6+3 60 Normal Yes
Swift Skinning Knife 1d8 75 Normal Yes
Swift Spear 1d20+1 54 Normal Yes
Swift War Fork 4d6 53 Normal Yes
War Fork 4d6 35 Normal Yes
War Fork of the Water Element 4d6+25 53 Normal No

item.title: Healing
item.description:
Healing Difficulties

Type Bandages needed Skill required
Normal heal 1 * Depends on missing health.
Cure level 1 poison 2 35
Cure level 2 poison 2 55
Cure level 3 poison 2 75
Cure level 4 poison 2 95
Cure level 5 poison 2 115
Cure level 6 poison 2 135
Resurrect 5 105 Healing 90 Anatomy

Creatures with Poison on Hit

Tip: The best way to train your healing skill is by getting poisoned.

item.title: Mace Fighting
item.description:
Mace fighting will increase the damage and hit chance with mace fighting weapons.

Mages don’t need Mace Fighting to increase the hit chance when using staves.

Weapon Damage (x dices with x sides + fixed damage) Speed (Higher is faster) Hit type Blocks casting if equipped
Anubis’s Mace of Death 4d3+36 75 Normal No
Black Staff 4d5+2 40 Normal No
Club 5d5 30 Normal Yes
Erik’s Big Basher 4d6+37 45 Slayer hit: Dragon slayer No
Gnarled Staff 4d4+5 30 Normal No
Grark’s Walking Stick 3d4+35 45 Normal No
Hammer Pick 4d6+1 30 Normal Yes
Mace 4d3+1 50 Normal Yes
Maul 4d4+2 40 Normal Yes

Mystical Club 5d5 30 Normal No

Mystical Quarterstaff 4d4 50 Normal No
Mystical Shepherd’s Crook 3d4 30 Normal No
Mystical War Axe 4d5+1 35 Normal No
Mystical War Hammer 4d6+2 34 Normal No
Mystical War Mace 4d6+2 30 Normal No
Nagash’s Staff of Sorcery 5d5+23 80 Spell hit: Spell: Elemental fury Chance of effect: 50% No
Omero’s Pickaxe 1d15+5 40 Normal No
Pickaxe 1d15 35 Normal Yes
Quarterstaff 4d4 50 Normal No
Shepherd’s Crook 3d4 30 Normal No
Stygian Black Staff 4d5+2 60 Normal No
Stygian Club 5d5 45 Normal No

Stygian Hammer Pick 4d6+1 45 Normal No
Stygian Mace 4d3+1 75 Normal No
Stygian Maul 4d4+2 60 Normal No
Stygian Quarterstaff 4d4 75 Normal No
Stygian Shepherd’s Crook 3d4 45 Normal No
Stygian War Axe 4d5+1 53 Normal No
Stygian War Hammer 4d6+2 51 Normal No
Stygian War Mace 4d6+2 45 Normal No
Swift Black Staff 4d5+2 60 Normal No
Swift Club 5d5 45 Normal Yes
Swift Gnarled Staff 4d4+5 45 Normal No
Swift Hammer Pick 4d6+1 45 Normal Yes
Swift Mace 4d3+1 75 Normal Yes
Swift Maul 4d4+2 60 Normal Yes
Swift Quarterstaff 4d4 75 Normal No
Swift Shepherd’s Crook 3d4 45 Normal No
Swift War Axe 4d5+1 53 Normal Yes
Swift War Hammer 4d6+2 51 Normal Yes
Swift War Mace 4d6+2 45 Normal Yes
Tjaldur’s Staff of Haste 5d5+20 90 Normal No
War Axe 4d5+1 35 Normal Yes
War Hammer 4d6+2 34 Normal Yes

item.title: Parrying
item.description:
Parrying will increase the chance to block and damage blocked with shields.

Shield Armor rating Properties Blocks casting if equipped
Bronze Shield 16 * Yes
Buckler 2 * Yes
Kite Shield 16 * Yes
Heater Shield 16 * Yes
Metal Shield 16 * Yes
Shield of the Holy Element 40 Holy protection 50% No
Shield of Drakon 60 Poison protection lvl 3 No
Shield of Ryous 60 Earth protection 75% No
Shield of Darkness 60 Necro protection 75% No
Elven Shield 60 Healing increase lvl 3 No
Kite Shield 16 * Yes
Wooden Shield 16 * Yes

item.title: Swordsmanship
item.description:
Swordsmanship will increase the damage and hit chance with bladed weapons.

Weapon Damage (x dices with x sides + fixed damage) Speed (Higher is faster) Hit type Blocks casting if equipped
Axe 4d7 33 Normal Yes
Axe of Anias 3d5+35 50 Spell hit: Spell: Explosion Chance of effect: 50% Circle 5 No
Balthazaar’s Chilling Scimitar 2d7+20 71 Spell hit: Spell: Ice Strike Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 10 No
Bardiche 5d6+3 22 Normal Yes
Bardiche of Lynx 5d6+38 33 Random slayer type each hit (Not human slayer) No
Battle Axe 3d6 38 Normal Yes
Broadsword 1d18+1 45 Normal Yes
Butcher Knife 2d4 45 Normal Yes
Cleaver 2d4+1 40 Normal Yes
Cutlass 2d7+2 45 Normal Yes
Double Axe 3d6+4 35 Normal Yes
Enchanted Sword of Zulu 1d23+35 38 Spell hit: Spell: Random(5 kinds) Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 5 No
Executioner’s Axe 3d5 33 Normal Yes
Halberd 5d6+5 15 Normal Yes
Halberd of Alcatraz 5d6+60 8 Normal No
Hatchet 1d8+1 40 Normal Yes
Katana 1d16 58 Normal Yes
Katana of Kieri 2d8+35 87 Normal No
Katana of the Fire Element 1d16+25 87 Spell hit: Spell: Fireball Chance of effect: 30% Circle: 5 No
Large Battle Axe 3d6+2 38 Normal Yes
Longsword 3d5+2 45 Normal Yes

item.title: Tactics
item.description: Higher tactics will increase your chance to hit with melee weapons.

item.title: Wrestling
item.description: Wrestling will increase the damage and hit chance with your fists.

item.title: Warrior
item.description:
Skills

  • Anatomy
  • Fencing
  • Healing
  • Mace Fighting
  • Parrying
  • Swordsmanship
  • Tactics
  • Wrestling

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with melee weapons.
  • Receives less melee damage.
  • Gains strength quicker.

Penalties

  • Can’t equip intelligence mods.
  • Takes increased spell damage.
  • Deals less spell damage.
  • Cast spells slower.
  • Won’t get any bonuses from equipping magic reflect items.
  • Can only cast circle 1 spells.
  • Gains intelligence slower.
